quicksight.topic.topiccolumn.CfnAbout: Represents a column in a dataset.

quicksight.topic.topiccolumn.Aggregation.Description: The type of aggregation that is performed on the column data when it's queried.
quicksight.topic.topiccolumn.Aggregation.Allowed values: AVERAGE | COUNT | DISTINCT_COUNT | MAX | MEDIAN | MIN | STDEV | STDEVP | SUM | VAR | VARP

quicksight.topic.topiccolumn.AllowedAggr.Description: The list of aggregation types that are allowed for the column. Valid values for this structure are `COUNT`, `DISTINCT_COUNT`, `MIN`, `MAX`, `MEDIAN`, `SUM`, `AVERAGE`, `STDEV`, `STDEVP`, `VAR`, `VARP`, and `PERCENTILE`.

quicksight.topic.topiccolumn.CellValueSy.Description: The other names or aliases for the column cell value.

quicksight.topic.topiccolumn.ColumnDataR.Description: The role of the column in the data. Valid values are `DIMENSION` and `MEASURE`.

quicksight.topic.topiccolumn.ColumnDescr.Description: A description of the column and its contents.

quicksight.topic.topiccolumn.ColumnFrien.Description: A user-friendly name for the column.

quicksight.topic.topiccolumn.ColumnSynon.Description: The other names or aliases for the column.

quicksight.topic.topiccolumn.Comparative.Description: The order in which data is displayed for the column when it's used in a comparative context.

quicksight.topic.topiccolumn.DefaultForm.Description: The default formatting used for values in the column.

quicksight.topic.topiccolumn.IsIncludedI.Description: A Boolean value that indicates whether the column is included in the query results.

quicksight.topic.topiccolumn.NeverAggreg.Description: A Boolean value that indicates whether to aggregate the column data when it's used in a filter context.

quicksight.topic.topiccolumn.NotAllowedA.Description: The list of aggregation types that are not allowed for the column. Valid values for this structure are `COUNT`, `DISTINCT_COUNT`, `MIN`, `MAX`, `MEDIAN`, `SUM`, `AVERAGE`, `STDEV`, `STDEVP`, `VAR`, `VARP`, and `PERCENTILE`.

quicksight.topic.topiccolumn.SemanticTyp.Description: The semantic type of data contained in the column.

quicksight.topic.topiccolumn.TimeGranula.Description: The level of time precision that is used to aggregate `DateTime` values.
quicksight.topic.topiccolumn.TimeGranula.Allowed values: DAY | HOUR | MINUTE | MONTH | QUARTER | SECOND | WEEK | YEAR
